datasets.name: DMR candidate MSC-Self-Instruct ranking ablation
datasets.selection_policy: stable source order after dataset-specific mapping policy

gpu_memory.unavailable_reason: GPU Process Memory counters had no samples for monitored process ids

limits: This pass varies top_k only; RRF/vector weights, chunking, and query expansion are not exposed by the current CLI.
Report excludes raw questions, answers, dialogs, and session text.
Results are ranking evidence, not official answer-generation DMR scores.
